extraction_note: The Wikipedia source provided contains gameplay mechanics, development credits, and platform information, but does not document any music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions), track information, or sound effects characteristics. The composers listed (Wally Beben for Amiga, David Warhol for C64, Seiji Toda for NES/PC-9800, Masayuki Kurinaga for PC98) are credited but no audio composition details are documented.
